about · vol. 01

Hi, I'm Niraj Acharjya. 👋

A Computer Science and Engineering student with a curiosity for technology, photography, and the endless process of learning something new every day.

Assam, India

This website is more than a blog — it's where I document my journey, share what I build, write about what inspires me, and preserve the moments I capture through my camera.

Why I created this

Social media is great for quick updates, but ideas tend to disappear into endless scrolling. I wanted one place to slow down — to write meaningful articles, showcase my projects, share my photography, and document my growth over the years.

Think of it as my digital notebook. My goal isn't to impress anyone with how much I know — it's to share what I'm learning, and hopefully help someone else along the way.

What you'll find here

💻

Technology

Programming, AI, cybersecurity, and web development — everything that fuels my curiosity as a CS student.

📸

Photography

Nature, landscapes, skies, rain, and everyday moments — every photograph has a story behind it.

🌍

Travel & Nature

Hidden places and peaceful landscapes, including the quiet beauty of Northeast India.

🚀

Projects

The sites, apps, and ideas I build while learning and experimenting with new technology.

My journey

Every expert was once a beginner. I'm still learning, still making mistakes, and still discovering new things every day — so instead of waiting until I know everything, I've decided to learn in public.

This website is a record of that: from my first lines of code to future projects, from my earliest photographs to the moments that shape who I become. Years from now, I hope to look back at these pages and see how far I've come.

"Curiosity is one of the greatest skills anyone can develop — and it doesn't stop after college."

Current goals

  • Become a skilled software engineer
  • Build useful, meaningful web applications
  • Improve my photography and storytelling
  • Share knowledge through articles and tutorials
  • Create projects that solve real-world problems

Beyond the screen

When I'm not coding, you'll probably find me exploring nature with my phone camera, watching dramatic monsoon skies, photographing details most people walk past, or planning the next thing I want to build.

Let's connect

Whether you're here to read an article, browse my photography, or just say hello — I'm genuinely glad you're here. I don't claim to know everything, but I promise to stay curious and share what I discover along the way.

Get in touch Read the blog post

See you around. — Niraj
